pr.title: Record: Two-Level Dirichlet Posterior Mixing — 0.11807 BPB

output.summary: Hierarchically smooth neural-base probabilities via Dirichlet posterior mixing across 2–15-gram backoff and phrase suffix probes.
techniques: Hierarchical Dirichlet smoothing chaining neural base, n-gram orders, and phrase suffix counts
Phrase suffix cache queried at fixed lengths with tuned concentration
Neural LM serves as the OBCL-informed base measure for each posterior
